svg.text: Do Baskets Dream — wiring on your actual board
DOIT ESP32 DevKit V1 · all connections on the TOP header (reachable from free row J) · USB 5V only.
Connections — all on the top header, tapped from free row J
D13 (GPIO13) → 470Ω → ring DIN (data — point to point, NOT a rail)
100µF cap across the rails (optional) — stripe leg on − rail
⚠ Before USB: data on ring IN (not OUT) · cap stripe on − rail · use VIN not 3V3 · nothing 12V.
